components.name: Site header
components.usage: Northstar Studio Start a conversation About Contact

components.name: Hero section
components.usage:
<livewire:hero-section>
  <livewire:slot name="eyebrow">Studio starter</livewire:slot>
  <livewire:slot name="title">A practical website scaffold for a service business.</livewire:slot>
  <livewire:slot name="body">Use this seed as a realistic starting point: navigation, hero, service cards, CTA, layout, and page composition.</livewire:slot>
</livewire:hero-section>

components.name: Feature card
components.usage:
<livewire:feature-card icon="01" title="Positioning sprint">
  <livewire:slot name="body">Clarify the offer, audience, proof, and page structure before design begins.</livewire:slot>
</livewire:feature-card>

components.name: CTA panel
components.usage:
<livewire:cta-panel title="Book a focused site sprint." action="Start the brief" href="#contact">
  <livewire:slot name="body">Use the seed as a realistic baseline for a studio, consultant, or productized service.</livewire:slot>
</livewire:cta-panel>

layouts.name: Base
layouts.usage:
Base layout preview

This frame owns the document shell, header, and footer.

layouts.name: Marketing
layouts.usage:
<x-layouts::marketing>
  <x-slot:hero>
    <livewire:hero-section />
  </x-slot:hero>

  <livewire:feature-card icon="01" title="Layout preview" />

  <x-slot:cta>
    <livewire:cta-panel title="Drop page content into this shell." action="Preview action" href="#contact" />
  </x-slot:cta>
</x-layouts::marketing>

layouts.name: About
layouts.usage:
An editorial shell for trust-building pages.

 Preview side-panel content.
